notes_limits: Business-reported adoption share; descriptive monitoring only.

kpi_label: CPS weekly-hours gap (high AI tercile minus low)
notes_limits: Survey-based weighted means by frozen AI terciles; descriptive only.

kpi_label: CPS unemployment-entry rate (high AI tercile origins)
notes_limits: Origin-mass-weighted mean of summary metric_value across high-tercile occ22 origins; origin_mass = sum of weighted_transition_count from figure2_panelB_transition_counts by (month, origin_state). Month = latest (descending) where both unemployment_entry_rate and nilf_entry_rate are computable. Descriptive matched-month construct only. Month alignment: CPS hours KPI uses latest month in figure2_panelA (2026-02); these entry KPIs use 2026-01. See docs/memo_visual_precision.md.

kpi_label: CPS NILF-entry rate (high AI tercile origins)
notes_limits: Origin-mass-weighted mean of summary metric_value across high-tercile occ22 origins; origin_mass = sum of weighted_transition_count from figure2_panelB_transition_counts by (month, origin_state). Month = latest (descending) where both unemployment_entry_rate and nilf_entry_rate are computable. Descriptive matched-month construct only. Month alignment: CPS hours KPI uses latest month in figure2_panelA (2026-02); these entry KPIs use 2026-01. See docs/memo_visual_precision.md.

kpi_label: Top-5 high-AI occupation groups: combined employment share
notes_limits: Structural occupation mix baseline; not evidence of realized AI impact.
